name: BICYCLE THERAPEUTICS PLC
business: Bicycle Therapeutics is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company developing a novel class of medicines called Bicycle molecules for diseases underserved by existing therapeutics. Its internal programs focus on oncology indications with high unmet medical need, with product candidates including nuzefatide pevedotin (a Bicycle Drug Conjugate) and BT1702 (a Bicycle Radioconjugate). The company collaborates with biopharmaceutical companies to apply its proprietary phage display screening platform to other therapeutic areas.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company developing a novel class of medicines, which we refer to as Bicycle molecules, for diseases that are underserved by existing therapeutics.

We are also developing BT1702, a Bicycle Radioconjugate, or BRC, molecule targeting Membrane Type 1 matrix metalloproteinase, or MT1-MMP, and carrying a lead-212, or 212 Pb, radioisotope payload for theranostic use.

catalysts.event: Phase II clinical trial for nuzefatide pevedotin in recurrent metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma commenced recruiting patients
catalysts.sentence: We are also evaluating nuzefatide pevedotin in a company-sponsored Phase II clinical trial to evaluate the efficacy, safety and pharmacokinetics of nuzefatide pevedotin in adult patients with recurrent metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma, which commenced recruiting patients in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Plan to present data for nuzefatide pevedotin in combination with nivolumab in metastatic urothelial cancer at a scientific conference in first half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: We plan to present data for nuzefatide pevedotin in combination with nivolumab in patients with metastatic urothelial cancer at a scientific conference in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Plan to present additional information regarding nuzefatide pevedotin in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma at a scientific conference in first half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: Additional information regarding this indication will be presented at a scientific conference in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Plan to present longer-term follow-up data for zelenectide pevedotin monotherapy and combination with pembrolizumab at a scientific conference in first half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: We plan to present longer-term follow-up data for zelenectide pevedotin used as a monotherapy in late-line metastatic urothelial cancer and additional data for zelenectide pevedotin in combination with pembrolizumab in first-line cisplatin-ineligible and cisplatin-eligible metastatic urothelial cancer at a scientific conference in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Plan to present EphA2 human imaging data in first half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: We plan to present additional EphA2 human imaging data in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Plan to present data from BT7480 combination cohort at a scientific conference in first half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: We plan to present data from the combination cohort at a scientific conference in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: After reporting combination data in first half of 2026, will no longer develop BT7480 internally
catalysts.sentence: After reporting combination data in the first half of 2026, we will no longer develop BT7480 internally and intend to explore partnership opportunities for future development.

catalysts.event: Plan to initiate first company-sponsored radioligand clinical trial for BT1702 in 2027
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate the first company-sponsored radioligand clinical trial for BT1702 in 2027.

catalysts.event: Strategic reprioritization in March 2026: convert Duravelo-2 to Phase II, deprioritize zelenectide pevedotin, discontinue certain trials, workforce reduction of approximately 30%
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, we announced the strategic reprioritization of our clinical portfolio to focus on our promising pipeline of next-generation therapeutics, including nuzefatide pevedotin as well as next-generation Bicycle conjugates, including BRC molecules.

catalysts.event: Workforce reduction substantially completed by end of 2026, with aggregate charges of approximately $8.0 million
catalysts.sentence: We expect the workforce reduction to be substantially completed by the end of 2026, and that we will incur aggregate charges, representing cash expenditure for severance and other employee termination benefits, of approximately $8.0 million.
